# Adobe Tools
> Give your team a creative edge. Create something beautiful, boost productivity, and deliver engaging experiences with Adobe software. 
Adobe offers a suite of industry-standard applications for photography, design, video editing, document editing, web development, and more.
## Adobe Acrobat
> Do it all with Acrobat. Create and edit PDFs. Collaborate with ease. E-sign documents and collect signatures. Get everything done in one app, wherever you work. Acrobat’s got it.
- [Acrobat Pro](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat.html): PDF editing and management.
- [25+ powerful PDF and e-signing tools for free - Adobe Acrobat](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online.html): Work smarter from anywhere with Acrobat online tools from Adobe, the inventor of the PDF format.
- [Chat with your docs - Acrobat Ai Assitant](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/generative-ai-pdf.html): Save time with AI Assistant. Break down complex language in contracts, summarize your docs in a click, and ask questions to get quick answers.
- [The original PDF solution -  Acrobat Reader](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/pdf-reader.html): View, share, sign, comment, and collaborate on PDFs for free on desktop and mobile.
- [Move your business forward with Acrobat solutions -  Acrobat Business](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/business.html): Streamline the way you work, communicate, and transact business. Plus, get AI-powered assistance, APIs and integrations, and built-in security tools.
- [Adobe Acrobat for students](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/students.html): Whether you need the ultimate creative toolkit or powerful PDF goodness, there’s a plan to help you succeed.
- [The essential document solution for nonprofits - Adobe Acrobat Pro](https://www.adobe.com/nonprofits/acrobat.html): Adobe Acrobat Pro is now available to eligible nonprofits for a special price. Nonprofits can work more efficiently and move faster with PDF and e-signature solutions.
- [Adobe Dcoument Cloud for Goverment](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/business/industries/government.html): Give citizens a faster digital way to sign.
- [eSign solution - Acrobat eSign](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/business/sign.html): eSign documents and manage all your PDFs in one place.
- [Edit PDFs](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/pdf-editor.html): Modify PDF content quickly.
- [Merge PDFs](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/merge-pdf.html): Combine PDF files.
- [Compress PDFs](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/compress-pdf.html): Reduce file size.
- [Convert PDF to Word](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/convert-pdf.html): Transform PDFs into editable Word documents.
- [Sign PDFs](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/sign-pdf.html): Add legally binding signatures.
- [Protect PDFs](https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/online/password-protect-pdf.html): Apply password security to PDFs.
## Creative Cloud
> Adobe Creative Cloud is a subscription-based platform that provides access to Adobe's suite of creative tools, including Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and more. It offers a range of features for creating and editing digital content, including cloud storage, collaboration tools, and access to a library of creative assets. 
- [Adobe Creative Cloud | Professional Creative Software](https://www.adobe.com/creativecloud.html): Enjoy the collection of professional creative software in Adobe Creative Cloud including Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro & more on desktop, mobile & web.
- [Official Adobe Photoshop - Free Trial and Online Photo & Design App](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop.html): Explore quick new ways to create custom scenes, make complex edits, & combine images online or with the free Photoshop mobile app.
- [Vector Graphics Software – Adobe Illustrator](https://www.adobe.com/products/illustrator.html): Powered by generative AI, magically transform a text prompt into a fully editable vector graphic with Adobe Illustrator, the industry-leading vector graphics software.
- [Layout design and desktop publishing software | Adobe InDesign](https://www.adobe.com/products/indesign.html): Create layout designs. Publish printed books, brochures, digital magazines, flyers, and interactive online documents with Adobe InDesign desktop publishing software.
- [Explore New Features in Photoshop - Adobe](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop/features.html): Explore Photoshop’s new amazing image-editing features for everything from simple to retouching to expressive artwork — and so much more.
- [Video editing that's always a cut above - Premiere Pro](https://www.adobe.com/products/premiere.html): Edit and trim video. Add effects. Mix audio. Animate titles. Magically add new frames to your clips. Supercharge your workflow with AI.
- [Your next move in motion design - After Effects](https://www.adobe.com/products/aftereffects.html): Animate still images and illustrations to create striking motion graphics. Add motion to text for cinematic title sequences and simple credit rolls and bring dimension into your videos in a true 3D workspace right inside After Effects.
- [Adobe Express](https://www.adobe.com/express/): Quick and easy content creation for social media and more.
- [Edit, organize, store and share photos from anywhere - Lightroom](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop-lightroom.html): Photo editing and organization.
- [Virtual Staging Studio - Substance 3D Stager](https://www.adobe.com/products/substance3d/apps/stager.html): Compose and render state-of-the-art 3D scenes in your own virtual studio. 
- [Lightroom Classic](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop-lightroom-classic.html): Desktop-focused photo editing.
- [Fresco](https://www.adobe.com/products/fresco.html): Digital painting and drawing.
- [Your one-touch photo editor - Photoshop Express ](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop-express.html): Get Photoshop Express, the mobile app made for all-in-one photo editing and sharing.
- [Collaborate and edit video with your team, anywhere - Premiere Pro Features](https://www.adobe.com/products/premiere/collaboration.html): Organize, review, and manage work-in-progress assets and the people and processes supporting them — all in one place.
- [Quickly output video files for virtually any screen - Media Encoder](https://www.adobe.com/products/media-encoder.html): Ingest, transcode, create proxies, and output to almost any format you can imagine.
- [Click. Capture. Create - Capture](https://www.adobe.com/products/capture.html): Transform images on your mobile device into creative building blocks for all your designs with our powerful vector converter.
- [Augmented reality - Adobe Aero](https://www.adobe.com/products/aero.html): Adobe Aero is the most intuitive way to build, view, and share robust immersive storytelling experiences in mobile AR.
## Firefly
> The next evolution of creative AI is here. Now you can create images, video, audio, and vector graphics in the Firefly app. Ideate, create, and collaborate on concepts with Firefly Boards. And work with the latest, greatest, commercially safe Firefly generative AI models.
- [Adobe Firefly - Free Generative AI for creatives](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly.html): Create stunning images, audio, and now video, all in one place, with Adobe Firefly. Go from ideation to production seamlessly with commercially safe Firefly models.
- [Transform ideas into stunning video clips for pitching ideas, b-roll, visual effects, and more with Text to Video and Image to Video - Adobe FireFly](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly/features/ai-video-generator.html): Generate videos online from text prompts using Adobe Fireflyss AI. Perfect for creating b-roll, special effects, and more!
- [Bring your ideas to life with Firefly’s Text to Image, Adobe's online AI image generator - Adobe FireFly ](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly/features/text-to-image.html): You can use text prompts to create and transform images quickly and easily, now with higher quality, more detail, and improved lighting and color.
- [Put your images into perspective with Scene to Image - Adobe FireFly](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly/features/scene-to-image.html): Create compositions for product visualizations, architectural renders, concept art, and much more. With Scene to Image in Adobe Firefly, you can build precise structures to use as references for generating new images.
- [Translate your videos into different languages with the Translate Video module - Adobe FireFly](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly/features/translate-video.html): With Translate Video, you can sound just like a native speaker in more than 20 languages.
- [Jump-start your creative ideas with Firefly Boards - Adobe FireFly](https://www.adobe.com/products/firefly/features/moodboard.html): Quickly visualize ideas with new Firefly Boards, the generative AI-first approach to moodboarding.
## Substance 3D
- [Paint game-changing textures in real time - Substance 3D Painter](https://www.adobe.com/products/substance3d/apps/painter.html): Texture 3D models in real time with this industry standard app. 
- [Digitize and enrich assets with our 3D photogrammetry app - Substance 3D Sampler](https://www.adobe.com/products/substance3d/apps/sampler.html): Create 3D materials and lights in a flash from real-life images.
- [Design parametric 3D assets with full control and infinite possibilities - Substance 3D Designer ](https://www.adobe.com/products/substance3d/apps/designer.html): Create seamless materials, patterns, image filters, and environment lights with infinite variations.
- [Create 3D Models on Desktop and in VR - Substance 3D Modeler](https://www.adobe.com/products/substance3d/apps/modeler.html): Intuitively create 3D models on desktop and in VR. 
## Audio
- [Audition](https://www.adobe.com/products/audition.html): Audio recording, mixing, and restoration.
## Web & UX
- [Dreamweaver](https://www.adobe.com/products/dreamweaver.html): Web design and development.
## Additional Tools
- [Bridge](https://www.adobe.com/products/bridge.html): Media asset management.
- [Collaborate with copywriters and editors - InCopy](https://www.adobe.com/products/incopy.html): InCopy lets copywriters and editors style text, track changes, and make simple layout modifications to a document while designers work on the same document simultaneously in Adobe InDesign — all without overwriting each other’s contributions.
